capabilities.name: Schema Review
capabilities.description: Review schema changes for consistency, compatibility, and contract safety.

capabilities.name: Contract Alignment
capabilities.description: Check that docs, schemas, and runtime artifacts agree on canonical contracts.
capabilities.validation_method: Produces explicit alignment notes across artifact surfaces.

capabilities.name: Runtime Verification
capabilities.description: Run runtime validation and summarize pass/fail status.

capabilities.name: Smoke Validation
capabilities.description: Run end-to-end smoke flow for CLI and runtime surfaces.
capabilities.validation_method: Produces smoke JSON result with approval path evidence.

capabilities.name: Need Validation
capabilities.description: Validate, reframe, reject, defer, or experiment-test an incoming need before project creation.
capabilities.validation_method: Produces a problem statement, value hypothesis, alternative analysis, and a need validation record before project creation.
